item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings, online friends
i see one dog, and a rug
this is a personal attack on me
Stevie is actually not so whiny about food. but if you miss his 7pm Laser Time, beware
what could go wrong?
McDs in the 90s definitely hit different. but the latest QPs are actually pretty good too. i just miss the 90s prices
i never tire of watching this movie. the songs are genius
finally
booking my flight now
mmm hmm
life is cruel sometimes
the mandolin is an underrated instrument. check out Jerry Garcia's collabs with mando master David Grisman
it's very unique looking?
obviously
urine is moving up
sounds rough
as is tradition
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: MRW the neighbor renting the house next door knocks on mine at 10pm to ask me to shut my A/C off.
item.description: Uncomfortably awkward confrontation tonight, not made better by someone knocking on my front door while I'm trying to sleep. She insisted the air conditioner unit for my house was too noisy for her to sleep, and thus I need to turn it off. I humored her enough to go out to listen to it, and it's quiet as ever. It gets regular service, and the noise she isn't liking is when the compressor charges up. I explained to her that the compressor is going to make some noise no matter what, that's how they work, and it's no louder than it was when it was first installed. Our houses are maybe 50ft apart so if they have their windows open, they'll hear it. That's just how sound works. She didn't want to hear it and just kept hammering on how it's too noisy for her, it shouldn't be on the side of the house it's on, it sounds like a truck engine, yadda yadda. I didn't know a clever way to end that mess of an encounter and ended up suggesting she shut her window, then went back inside. Fifty fifty odds on her calling an ordinance officer or some nonsense, but if she does the A/C will be whirring away for them to do whatever. In the meantime I moved the Ring camera I use to check on Story (my cat) to the window above the A/C unit, because I don't trust her tonight. Bleh.
item.dc:creator: ElbowDeepInAHorse

item.title: There's no debate on this one, that's just facs
item.description: Edit: Before yall come for me more, this is a joke ? I am also a women and I'm not trying to "turn women against each other" it's a meme lmfaoo obviously they both have they're thing but I personally love Moana more bc she literally SAVED HER ENTIRE TRIBE ? Ariel went off to live her dream and we love that but Moana did some seriously inspiring shit!

item.title: Right-wing ads on Imgur?! Fuck!
item.description:
Guys. This is serious shit. I've been seeing ads for the German right-wing extremist party AfD, so called "Alternative für Deutschland" here on Imgur! They are a serious threat for our democracy- so serious that even our intelligence service is watching them as a potential right-wing extremist group that tries to dismantle all we've built (with so much help from other countries!) since 1945. They want to be like the republican party in USA. They incite hate against anyone who's different- and anyone who disagrees with them. This leads to an atmosphere where more and more politicians are under attack- leading to horrible things like the execution-style murder of conservative politician Walter Lübcke 2019 (https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Murder_of_Walter_L%C3%BCbcke), who supported helping refugees, and the horrible Hanau shootings, where one man killed eleven people in downtown Hanau, almost all of whom were non-white (https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hanau_shootings). They are planning to get rid of everyone who's somehow different (immigrants, LGBTQ, you name it), should they ever win (https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/2023_Potsdam_far-right_meeting). And they are taking money from Russia. Allowing them to advertise here is fucking dangerous and unacceptable for this site, which wants to be for people and for democracy. Please help to boost the signal! This has to stop!
This was one of the ads. I'm seeing another one right now, while writing the post. FUCK AfD, fuck Nazis! MV edit: thank y'all so much! Seeing the support of this community gives my courage. Love y'all!
item.dc:creator: CloudsandRainandSunandWind

item.title: A meteorite crossed the sky of the Iberian Peninsula (18-May-2024)
item.description: A meteorite crossed the sky of the Iberian Peninsula on the night of May 18 to 19, 2024. It could be seen in different regions of Spain, Portugal and some parts of France. It had a blue-green tail finished in yellow or orange, probably due to the type of mineral composition.
item.dc:creator: elarcano

item.title: Every morning and night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife memes as a love note. Whimsical, bizarre, funny, dad jokes, advice, jams, & nightmare fuel sprinkled on top. Here’s the latest. Tell me if you want an invite to future posts. #DFTBA.
item.description:
Be silly today. I love you. Dad.
Priorities.
MAGIC!!
Dad joke hoo ha ha.
Look at them. How cute. Felt kind of whisky sending the unsolicited dik dik pic above, TBH.
Reflect! Every day. It’s one of the best habits you can choose to form.
Obligatory Maryland post
Now I know why your mom wants her Krab shredded.
But it’s a little permit crab, so just a little bad thing.
Forbidden pancakes. Make some for your mother for Mother’s Day. Regular ones. Not the forbidden ones.
I’m tempted to buy these and wear them to Red Lobster.
Nice hat.
Sit up straight.
flap flap flap flap flap it’s coming
Umm, gosh. We are frogs of action. Lies do not become us.
Forbidden guacamole ?
Forbidden shrimp cocktail
Dad joke hoo ha ha.
I love you. Good morning.
And I’m not going to start watching this crap, either.
Remember to text before coming home or else you’re going to see a WHOLE LOTTA DAD.
By the way. The neighbors all have it again.
Hang in there. We’ll get through this together.
Why?
Say it.
Good night. I love you.
Sweet dreams.
Finals week for two of you. Don’t let the pressure get too much for you. Let me know if you need anything. I’m proud of you.
Doi da doi.
Cats are evil.
Ok. Cats are NEUTRAL evil.
Ha! You’re all adults now. What’s that feeling next to your dread? Oh, it’s the limberness of your back and knees leaving. Welcome to adulthood, suckas.
Be whimsical today.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nBHkIWAJitg
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nBHkIWAJitg
OoooOooOOOooooo! What’s that sound? Oh. It’s her moaning. I bet her name is Myrtle.
Get up! Have a great day! I love you.
I love you, bitches.
5005135!
Have a great day!
Boo!
Let’s face it.
Look out. He has pepper spray.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason

item.title: The Tenthst, First Edition: Straight up Crocposting
item.description:
The lights are like a color out of space. Very pretty, but best not to look directly at them.
Cats are the goddamn best.
I need to get me a pair of these.
All of my best socks are like this.
I am a combination of the bottom two.
... Hot.
... Your collar is beeping.
How I'm trying to be.
It's cute, but nowhere near as sexy as the elite knight set. Or the brass set.
It's called being a service sub, thank you very much.
Baby Blue pictures! Isn't he so cute.

item.title: Finally something went right this week
item.description: Had a dozen mishaps and bad luck all week. I was able to turn it around a bit when I actually managed to fix the lawnmower. My dad passed 8 years ago and there are so many things I wasn't able to learn from him that I wish I could've. He was super handy and I have all his tools but not all his knowledge. A few youtube videos later and some help from a friendly neighbor and it works! Small victories but victories nonetheless
